offer: For insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/week, lack of timely updates causes workflow inefficiencies. We generate weekly claims status reports instead of manual tracking through emails and spreadsheets.
problem: Lack of timely updates on claims status leads to inefficient workflow.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance adjusters
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
DM outreach to insurance adjusters with demo video
Participate in community forums for insurance tools
try_it: Let users try email notifications and user-friendly dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
